title: agentify-prds-index
description: Schema for prds/INDEX.json, the registry that maps PRD ids to their directories. Written by task_backend_drivers/markdown.sh:markdown__alloc_prd_id under a flock. Every prd_create call also appends an entries[] row (post-C6 fix: the append now happens INSIDE the same lock so concurrent prd_create calls don't lose entries).

next_id.description: Next zero-padded four-digit id to allocate. markdown__alloc_prd_id increments this under flock.
